meaning: 卡塞尔[德意志联邦共和国东部城市]
examples: From Germany - from Kassel - with all science and effortless.
The art crowd arrived in Kassel coming from the Basel Artfair.
Kassel Documenta is a prestigious international art exhibition.
At least 750, 000 people are expected to turn up in Kassel for a closer look.
An art teacher in Kassel created Documenta in 1955 with the aim of unearthing artworks deemed degenerate by the Nazis.
